title: eleocharis arseniflora
intro: Eleocharis arseniflora, also known as arsenic club-rush or arsenic sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal activities. Eleocharis arseniflora is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and roots are typically dried and used in infusions or decoctions, but it is essential to note that using this plant for medicinal purposes requires caution due to its potential toxicity.
